additions.litematica.config.colors.comment.schemat:
The color of the blocks overlay for different blocks of
the same pre-defined types, and the block states match
additions.litematica.config.generic.comment.enable:
If enabled, the "Wrong Block" verifier displays
will potentially show a "Different Blocks" status
based on various Block Tag groupings; where this is only
shown if the Block State matches; or else it
will result in a "Wrong State" result.
You could then disable this overlay rendering under Visuals.
Example:  Using white glass instead of glass;
or stone brick walls instead of deep slate brick walls.
additions.litematica.config.generic.comment.schema:
The deletion mode to use for removing the previous schematic version
when pasting the next version in the Schematic VCS mode
additions.litematica.config.hotkeys.comment.schema:
A key to delete blocks from the world based on the currently
selected version's placement.
See Generic -> 'schematicVcsDeleteMode' for the delete mode/behavior
additions.litematica.config.visuals.comment.enable:
Enable the Fake Lighting Provider,
which has always been the default before.
Disable this to use a Vanilla lighting provider,
and then enable "renderAOModernEnable"
to get the full vanilla-like lighting effects.
This is mainly useful for when using shaders.
additions.litematica.config.visuals.comment.render:
The fixed Lighting level of the Fake Lighting Provider.
Generally, you'll want this left alone at 15, but
then you can manually adjust the brightness of the build.
This will only work if "renderAOModernEnable" is enabled.
additions.litematica.config.visuals.comment.schema:
Enables the schematic overlay for different blocks. See "Generic.enableDifferentBlocks"
This overlay type highlights blocks that have the correct state,
but a different block type from the same Block Tags group.
Examples might include stairs or walls of the same
shape, glass, concrete, etc; but a different material or color was used.
additions.litematica.error.schematic_conversion.sp: Failed to create the Litematica schematic
Failed to load the Sponge Schematic
additions.litematica.error.schematic_conversion.st: Failed to convert the Structure to a Litematica Schematic
Failed to load the Vanilla Structure
additions.litematica.error.schematic_load.newer_mi:
Schematic is from a future version of Minecraft: '%d' > '%d'
Some NBT data may be at risk of corruption.

deletions.litematica.error.schematic_conversion.st: Failed to convert the Structure to a Litematica Schematic

litematica.config.hotkeys.comment.render.old:
The key that enables rendering the block info overlay.
Use NONE for not requiring a key to be pressed.
Disable the similarly named option in the Visuals
configs to disable the overlay completely.
litematica.config.hotkeys.comment.render.new:
The key that enables rendering the block info overlay.
Use NONE for not requiring a key to be pressed,
in addition to setting "Allow Empty" under the Advanced Keybind settings.
Disable the similarly named option in the Visuals
configs to disable the overlay completely.
